mapper.select: SELECT COALESCE(SUM(borrow_quantity), 0) FROM equipment_borrow WHERE equipment_id = #{equipmentId} AND borrow_status = 1 AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM equipment_return er WHERE er.borrow_id = equipment_borrow.id AND er.return_status = 1)
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM equipment_repair WHERE equipment_id = #{equipmentId} AND repair_status = 1

SELECT * FROM equipment_borrow WHERE equipment_id = #{equipmentId} AND user_id = #{userId} AND borrow_status = 1 AND borrow_quantity > COALESCE(( SELECT SUM(er.repair_quantity) FROM equipment_return er WHERE er.borrow_id = equipment_borrow.id AND er.return_status = 1 AND er.repair_quantity IS NOT NULL ), 0)

SELECT * FROM equipment_borrow WHERE equipment_id = #{equipmentId} AND borrow_status = 1 AND borrow_quantity > COALESCE(( SELECT SUM(er.repair_quantity) FROM equipment_return er WHERE er.borrow_id = equipment_borrow.id AND er.return_status = 1 AND er.repair_quantity IS NOT NULL ), 0)

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM equipment_borrow WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND borrow_status = 1 AND expected_return_time < NOW() AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM equipment_return er WHERE er.borrow_id = equipment_borrow.id AND er.return_status = 1)
